content: AUOS is an application-layer AI operating system coordinating agents, memory, credentials, projects, deployments, and automations above the host OS.
AUOS should integrate the 7-agent Project Launch Swarm: orchestrator, environment/deployment, context, brand, backend/memory, frontend/microfrontends, and secrets broker.
Secrets Broker must report credential names and present/missing status only. Raw values must never enter docs, memory, UI, or logs.
